name: Balena Cloud API
description: The balena API provides access to resources associated with your account including fleets, devices, releases, environment variables, and more. It follows OData conventions for querying ($filter, $select, $expand, $orderby, $top, $skip). Authentication is via session tokens or named API keys passed as Bearer tokens.
